text.title: shadcn/ui Architecture Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules grounding the shadcn/ui Architecture methodology. Every rule pairs a binary check with sourced rationale, plus the universal skip-this-methodology gate.

rule.statement: `components/ui/*` MUST NOT import from `features/*`, business APIs, or auth/state stores; primitives stay generic.
rule.rationale: Business leakage makes primitives reusable in name only; every feature requirement bleeds in and primitives become untestable independently.

rule.statement: `components/ui/` MUST be guarded by CODEOWNERS + a lint rule OR require a separate explicit PR; silent edits inside feature PRs are forbidden.
rule.rationale: Primitive changes are blast-radius high — they affect every consumer. Silent agent edits are a top source of regressions.

rule.statement: Colors, radii, spacing MUST be defined as semantic tokens in `:root` and `.dark` of `globals.css`; concrete Tailwind shades (`dark:bg-gray-800`, `bg-[#abc123]`) are banned via ESLint.
rule.rationale: Concrete shades require per-component dark-mode overrides; semantic tokens propagate theme changes automatically.

rule.statement: Variants MUST use `cva` with `compoundVariants` for state combinations; flat variants beyond 6 per prop are forbidden.
rule.rationale: Flat variant explosion creates a 12+-variant primitive impossible to maintain or visually verify.

rule.statement: Every primitive MUST use `React.forwardRef` and set `displayName` immediately after; missing forwardRef or displayName is rejected.
rule.rationale: Without forwardRef, Radix asChild slot breaks; without displayName, React DevTools shows `_c2` and debugging is impossible.

rule.statement: Components MUST export both the component AND its `*Variants` cva function (e.g. `buttonVariants`); component-only export is rejected.
rule.rationale: Downstream compositions need `cn(buttonVariants({ variant }))` for non-button elements styled to match.

rule.statement: Primitives that wrap an HTML element MUST accept Radix `asChild` (or equivalent) via the Slot pattern; hard-coded element types are forbidden for primitives.
rule.rationale: Without asChild, primitives cannot be composed into different elements (e.g. Button-as-Link), forcing feature code to reimplement styling.

rule.statement: Apply this methodology only if all entries in `## Applies If` hold and none of `## Skip If` triggers; otherwise abort and route to the correct methodology.

rationale.source: F-066 spec - decision tree minimum form

rule.rationale: A misrouted methodology produces wrong-shape output; the explicit skip rule is the universal default branch from the decision tree.
